useCases.title: Centralize Product Development
useCases.description: Qonto uses Notion to centralize product development with a single roadmap, automated progress tracking, and customized Kanban workflows.

useCases.title: Unify Knowledge and Work
useCases.description: Qonto maintains a company wiki, teamspaces, and individual pages in Notion as a single source of truth for documentation and task management.

useCases.title: Enhance Cross-Functional Collaboration
useCases.description: Qonto integrates Notion with tools like FigJam and Slack to minimize manual work and maintain company-wide alignment.

faq.question: What plans is Notion AI available on?
faq.answer: Notion AI is only available on Business and Enterprise Plans, though Free and Plus Plans get a limited number of complimentary AI responses.

faq.question: What is Notion Agent?
faq.answer: Notion Agent is a customizable AI teammate that can take on tasks from start to finish, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create or edit content like pages and databases.

faq.question: How do I use Notion AI to translate a page?
faq.answer: Go to the three-dot menu at the top of the page, select Translate, and Notion AI will translate the page into your desired language.

faq.question: What are the limits for AI image generation in Notion?
faq.answer: During beta, users have a limit of 10 image generations or edits per 24 hours and 30 per 30 days, with limits resetting on a rolling basis.

faq.question: What is Cursor?
faq.answer: Cursor is an AI-native code editor built as a fork of VS Code by Anysphere, embedding AI directly into the editor with features like inline tab completions, Composer for multi-file edits, and background agents on cloud VMs.

faq.question: Is Cursor free?
faq.answer: Yes, Cursor has a free Hobby tier with 2,000 code completions per month and 50 slow premium model requests, but most professional developers upgrade to Pro for unlimited completions and more features.

faq.question: Does Cursor work in JetBrains or Neovim?
faq.answer: No, Cursor is only available as a standalone IDE and does not have plugins for JetBrains, Neovim, Visual Studio, or Xcode.

faq.question: Does Cursor send my code to the cloud?
faq.answer: Yes, Cursor routes code through its own servers to reach the AI model, but you can enable Privacy Mode to prevent code from being stored or used for training.

tagline: Turn any document into an editable podcast episode with AI
description: VocalVia is an AI podcast generator that converts PDFs, articles, notes, and reports into structured podcast episodes. It creates an editable script with roles, pacing, and expression tags before generating audio, giving creators full editorial control over the final output.
features: Editable script with roles, pacing, and expression tags before audio generation
Multiple script styles: solo narration, two-host conversation, study tutor, business briefing
Voice library with preview and voice cloning
PDF, article, URL, and text input support
Podcast tags for directing episodes like a producer

name: NotebookLM
tagline: Google's AI notebook that turns documents into audio overviews
description: NotebookLM is Google's AI-powered research assistant that can generate Audio Overview podcasts from uploaded documents. It synthesizes sources into conversational two-host audio summaries, making it easy to digest research papers, reports, and notes.

features: Upload up to 50 sources per notebook
Audio Overview: two-host conversational podcast from documents
Upload PDFs, Google Docs, websites, YouTube videos, and audio files

name: Jellypod
tagline: Create and automate AI podcasts with customizable hosts
description: Jellypod is an AI podcast studio that transforms topics and documents into realistic podcasts with customizable hosts. It supports voice cloning, 70+ languages, and automated workflows including newsletter-to-podcast conversion.

features: Spotify, YouTube and Apple Podcasts distribution
Priority support and dedicated Slack channel
AI podcast studio with customizable hosts and voices
One-click distribution to Spotify, YouTube, and Apple Podcasts
API access for programmatic podcast creation
Hosted podcast website with custom domain

name: Podhoc
tagline: Turn PDFs and videos into podcasts you control
description: Podhoc is an AI podcast generator that converts PDFs, URLs, and videos into podcasts with no subscription required. It uses a pay-as-you-go credit model with credits that never expire, supporting 74 languages and 8 audio styles.
features: Pay-as-you-go credit model with no subscription required
PDF, URL, and video input support

name: SparkPod
tagline: AI podcast generator from any source
description: SparkPod generates studio-quality podcast episodes from PDFs, URLs, YouTube videos, and notes. It features natural AI hosts that pause, laugh, and talk over each other like real people, with support for 30+ languages.

features: Direct publishing to Spotify and Apple Podcasts
Studio-quality audio with natural AI hosts
Supports PDF, URL, YouTube, and text input
Script editing with host swapping mid-episode
Direct publishing to Spotify and Apple Podcasts
Solo monologue and two-host conversation formats

name: Podcastify
tagline: Generate AI podcasts in seconds from any content
description: Podcastify turns any text, document, URL, PDF, or image into a two-host podcast in seconds. It offers full control over script and vocal style with 20+ premium AI voices and 9+ conversation styles.
features: Input via text, PDF, URL, or image

name: Parlant
tagline: Build and deploy AI agents with ease.
description: Parlant is an open-source platform for developing, testing, and deploying AI agents. It provides tools for prompt management, agent orchestration, and performance monitoring, catering to developers building production-ready AI applications.

name: AgentOS
tagline: TypeScript framework for autonomous AI agent development.
description: AgentOS is an open-source SDK for developing, testing, and deploying AI agents. It provides a modular framework and pre-built components to accelerate agent creation for developers.

name: Agno
tagline: Build multimodal AI agents with ease.
description: Agno is an open-source platform for building, deploying, and scaling multimodal AI agents. It provides a unified framework for integrating vision, language, and audio models, serving developers and AI teams.

name: Arize Phoenix
tagline: Open-source AI observability and debugging.
description: Arize Phoenix is an open-source platform for monitoring, debugging, and improving AI models in production. It helps ML engineers and data scientists track model performance, detect drift, and troubleshoot issues.

name: Beam
tagline: Unified batch and stream processing framework
description: Apache Beam is an open-source, unified model for defining both batch and streaming data-parallel processing pipelines. It provides a portable API layer that allows pipelines to be executed on multiple execution engines like Apache Flink, Spark, and Google Cloud Dataflow. Beam is ideal for data engineers and developers building complex data processing applications.
features: Rich SDKs in Java, Python, Go

name: Bifrost
tagline: Ultra-fast AI gateway with enterprise-grade reliability.
description: Bifrost is an open-source platform for building, testing, and deploying AI agents. It provides a visual workflow editor and integrates with popular LLMs, making it ideal for developers and teams.

name: Botpress
tagline: Open-source conversational AI platform.
description: Botpress is an open-source platform for building, deploying, and managing chatbots and virtual assistants. It provides a visual flow editor, NLU engine, and integrations for developers and enterprises.

name: ByteChef
tagline: Low-code platform for AI workflow automation.
description: ByteChef is a low-code platform that enables developers and business users to build, automate, and integrate AI workflows. It provides a visual interface for connecting AI models, APIs, and data sources without extensive coding.

name: CodeZero
tagline: AI-powered development platform for rapid coding.
description: CodeZero is an AI development platform that accelerates coding with intelligent assistance. It serves developers seeking to boost productivity through automated code generation and debugging.

name: CopilotKit
tagline: Build AI copilots into any app.
description: CopilotKit is an open-source framework for integrating AI-powered copilots into applications. It provides pre-built UI components and backend infrastructure to add conversational AI, automation, and context-aware assistance. Developers use it to create custom AI assistants that interact with users and perform actions within their apps.

name: Daytona
tagline: Open-source development environment manager.
description: Daytona is an open-source platform for managing development environments. It enables developers to create, share, and run reproducible dev environments across teams. The tool integrates with popular IDEs and version control systems.

name: E2B
tagline: Open-source runtime for AI agents.
description: E2B provides a secure, sandboxed cloud environment for running AI-generated code. It enables developers to build and deploy AI agents that can execute code, access the internet, and interact with files safely.

name: Envoy AI Gateway
tagline: Open-source AI gateway for secure, scalable API management.
description: Envoy AI Gateway is an open-source platform built on Envoy Proxy that provides unified access control, rate limiting, and observability for AI APIs. It helps developers and organizations manage multiple AI providers securely and efficiently.

name: Flowise AI
tagline: Build LLM apps visually with drag-and-drop.
description: Flowise AI is an open-source, low-code platform for building LLM applications using a visual drag-and-drop interface. It enables developers and non-developers to create custom AI workflows, chatbots, and agents without writing code. With 54K GitHub stars, it's a popular choice for rapid prototyping and deployment of generative AI solutions.

name: Giselle
tagline: AI development platform for rapid prototyping.
description: Giselle is an AI development platform that enables rapid prototyping and deployment of machine learning models. It provides a collaborative environment for data scientists and developers to build, test, and iterate on AI solutions efficiently.

name: Grepture
tagline: Build AI apps with visual workflows.
description: Grepture is a low-code platform for creating AI-powered applications using visual workflow builders. It enables developers and non-developers to design, test, and deploy AI agents without extensive coding.

name: Suna
tagline: Build AI apps with drag-and-drop simplicity.
description: Suna is a low-code AI development platform that enables users to create, deploy, and manage AI applications without extensive coding. It serves developers and businesses looking to rapidly prototype and launch AI solutions.

name: Supermemory
tagline: Build AI apps with memory and context.
description: Supermemory is an open-source platform for developing AI applications with persistent memory and contextual awareness. It provides tools for managing conversation history, user profiles, and long-term memory, enabling developers to create more personalized and coherent AI experiences.

name: Trieve
tagline: Open-source AI search and RAG platform.
description: Trieve is an open-source platform for building AI-powered search and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications. It provides tools for indexing, searching, and generating answers from your data, serving developers and teams who need customizable search solutions.

name: Activeloop
tagline: Manage and version datasets for ML.
description: Activeloop is a data platform for machine learning that enables versioning, querying, and visualizing datasets. It provides a scalable infrastructure for storing and streaming large-scale datasets, making it easier for ML teams to collaborate and iterate.

name: Chroma
tagline: Open-source embedding database for AI apps.
description: Chroma is an open-source embedding database designed to make it easy to build AI applications with embeddings. It provides a simple API for storing, searching, and managing embeddings, and integrates seamlessly with popular AI frameworks.

name: Deepnote
tagline: Collaborative data science platform for teams.
description: Deepnote is a cloud-based notebook environment designed for data science and machine learning teams. It enables real-time collaboration, integrates with popular data sources and tools, and provides a seamless experience for exploratory analysis and model development.

name: Helicone
tagline: Open-source LLM observability platform
description: Helicone is an open-source platform for monitoring, debugging, and improving large language model (LLM) applications. It provides real-time logging, cost tracking, and performance metrics for AI systems.

name: Laminar
tagline: Open-source ML infrastructure for observability.
description: Laminar is an open-source platform for monitoring and debugging machine learning pipelines. It provides tools for tracking experiments, visualizing model performance, and detecting anomalies, serving data scientists and ML engineers.

name: Letta
tagline: Open-source framework for building LLM agents with memory.
description: Letta is an open-source framework for creating LLM agents with persistent memory. It provides tools for managing agent state, enabling long-term context and personalized interactions. Ideal for developers building advanced AI assistants.

name: Mem0
tagline: Memory layer for personalized AI apps
description: Mem0 provides a memory layer for AI applications, enabling them to remember user preferences and context across sessions. It offers a simple API for storing and retrieving memories, making it easy to build personalized experiences. Ideal for developers building chatbots, virtual assistants, and other AI-driven tools.

name: OpenLIT
tagline: Open-source observability for LLMs and ML models.
description: OpenLIT is an open-source platform for monitoring and tracing large language models (LLMs) and machine learning models. It provides real-time performance insights, cost tracking, and debugging capabilities for AI applications.

name: Weaviate
tagline: Open-source vector database for AI applications.
description: Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, enabling fast semantic search and AI-powered applications. It supports hybrid search combining vector and keyword search, and integrates with machine learning models for real-time data enrichment.

name: LiteLLM
tagline: Open-source proxy for 100+ LLMs with security.
description: LiteLLM is an open-source proxy that provides a unified interface for over 100 large language models, ensuring secure and private API calls. It helps developers manage costs, track usage, and enforce access controls across multiple LLM providers.

name: Proxed AI
tagline: Secure AI interactions with privacy-first proxy.
description: Proxed AI is a privacy-focused proxy for AI services, ensuring data security and anonymity. It serves developers and businesses needing to protect sensitive data when using AI APIs.

name: 5ire
tagline: Open-source AI assistant for developers.
description: 5ire is an open-source AI assistant that integrates with your terminal and code editor to help you write, debug, and understand code. It supports multiple AI providers and offers a privacy-first, local-first experience for developers.

name: Amical
tagline: Build custom AI chat interfaces effortlessly.
description: Amical is an open-source platform for creating and deploying AI-powered chat interfaces. It enables developers to build custom conversational agents with minimal code, integrating with various AI models and data sources.

name: AnythingLLM
tagline: Your all-in-one AI workspace for documents and chat.
description: AnythingLLM is an open-source desktop application that lets you interact with multiple AI models, including local and cloud-based LLMs. It supports document ingestion, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), and custom AI agents, making it ideal for developers and power users who want a unified interface for AI tasks.

name: Browser Operator
tagline: AI agent that controls your browser.
description: Browser Operator is an open-source AI agent that automates browser tasks by interpreting natural language commands. It helps developers and power users streamline web workflows without manual scripting.

name: Colanode,
tagline: Open-source, local-first alternative to Slack and Notion for data control.
description: Colanode is an open-source, local-first platform that combines team communication and knowledge management, serving as an alternative to Slack and Notion. It prioritizes user data control and privacy.

name: Skyvern
tagline: AI-powered browser automation for complex tasks.
description: Skyvern uses computer vision and LLMs to automate browser workflows that are difficult for traditional scripts. It handles CAPTCHAs, multi-step forms, and dynamic content without custom code.

name: Steel
tagline: Open-source AI interaction framework.
description: Steel is an open-source framework for building AI-powered user interfaces. It provides tools for developers to create interactive AI experiences with ease.

name: SurfSense
tagline: AI-powered browser extension for smart web interactions.
description: SurfSense is a browser extension that uses AI to enhance your web browsing experience by providing context-aware summaries, smart search, and personalized content recommendations. It serves users who want to navigate the web more efficiently and discover relevant information faster.

name: Swirl Search
tagline: Unify AI search across multiple sources.
description: Swirl Search is an open-source AI-powered search platform that aggregates results from various data sources, including databases, APIs, and web searches. It uses large language models to understand queries and deliver relevant, unified results, ideal for enterprises needing to search across siloed information.

name: Typebot
tagline: Build advanced chatbots visually.
description: Typebot is an open-source tool for creating conversational chatbots with a visual builder. It allows you to design complex flows, collect user data, and integrate with various platforms. Ideal for developers and businesses looking for a customizable chatbot solution.

name: VoiceInk
tagline: Voice-controlled AI for hands-free productivity.
description: VoiceInk is a browser extension that lets you dictate text and control your computer using voice commands. It leverages AI to provide accurate speech-to-text and natural language understanding for seamless interaction.
features: Dictate text in any input field

name: VoiceTypr
tagline: Voice-powered typing for faster, hands-free writing.
description: VoiceTypr is an AI-powered voice-to-text tool that converts speech into written text with high accuracy. It serves professionals, writers, and anyone looking to increase productivity by typing with their voice.

name: VT Chat
tagline: Chat with your data using AI.
description: VT Chat is an open-source tool that lets you interact with your data through natural language conversations. It connects to various data sources and uses AI to answer questions, generate insights, and perform actions based on your queries.

name: Zero
tagline: Open-source AI chat interface for local models.
description: Zero is an open-source desktop application that provides a clean, minimal interface for interacting with local AI models. It supports multiple model providers and runs entirely offline, ensuring privacy and fast response times.

name: Zola
tagline: Static site generator with AI-powered content.
description: Zola is a fast static site generator that integrates AI to help create and manage content. It serves developers and content creators who want efficient, automated site building with intelligent features.

name: Atomic CRM
tagline: Open-source CRM built with React and Material-UI.
description: Atomic CRM is an open-source customer relationship management tool built with React and Material-UI. It provides a modern, customizable interface for managing contacts, deals, and sales pipelines. Ideal for small to medium businesses seeking a flexible CRM solution.

name: Erxes
tagline: Open-source CRM for seamless customer engagement.
description: Erxes is an open-source CRM platform that helps businesses manage customer relationships, sales pipelines, and marketing campaigns. It serves teams looking for a customizable, self-hosted alternative to proprietary CRM tools.

name: EspoCRM
tagline: Open-source CRM for sales, marketing, and support.
description: EspoCRM is an open-source customer relationship management system designed for small to medium businesses. It helps manage sales pipelines, marketing campaigns, and customer support tickets in one platform.

name: Frappe CRM
tagline: Open-source CRM for sales teams
description: Frappe CRM is an open-source customer relationship management system designed for sales teams. It offers lead management, deal tracking, and communication tools to streamline sales processes. Built on the Frappe framework, it is highly customizable and integrates with other Frappe apps.

name: Krayin
tagline: Open-source CRM for growing businesses.
description: Krayin is a free, open-source CRM platform designed for small to medium businesses. It helps manage leads, contacts, and sales pipelines efficiently.

name: Malak
tagline: Open-source CRM for VC firms
description: Malak is an open-source CRM designed specifically for venture capital firms to manage deal flow, portfolio companies, and investor relationships. It offers a centralized platform for tracking interactions and pipeline stages.

name: Odoo
tagline: All-in-one business software suite
description: Odoo is a comprehensive suite of business applications including CRM, sales, project management, and more. It serves small to large enterprises seeking an integrated, open-source platform to manage their operations.

name: Open Mercato
tagline: Open-source CRM for modern sales teams.
description: Open Mercato is an open-source CRM platform designed for sales teams seeking a customizable and transparent solution. It offers core CRM functionalities like contact management, pipeline tracking, and analytics, all while allowing full data ownership and self-hosting.

name: Relaticle
tagline: Open-source CRM built for relationship-driven sales.
description: Relaticle is an open-source CRM platform designed to streamline sales processes and team collaboration. It offers customizable pipelines, contact management, and analytics to help businesses track leads and close deals efficiently.

name: Lago
tagline: Open-source billing and usage metering.
description: Lago is an open-source platform for usage-based billing and metering. It helps SaaS companies manage subscriptions, invoices, and payments with real-time usage tracking.

name: Meteroid
tagline: Open-source billing for modern SaaS.
description: Meteroid is an open-source billing platform designed for SaaS companies. It handles usage-based pricing, invoicing, and revenue recognition, helping finance teams automate complex billing workflows.

name: Midday
tagline: Open-source accounting for freelancers.
description: Midday is an open-source accounting platform tailored for freelancers and small businesses. It simplifies invoicing, expense tracking, and financial reporting with a clean, intuitive interface.

name: OpenBB
tagline: Open-source investment research platform.
description: OpenBB is a free and open-source platform for investment research, providing access to financial data and analytics. It serves individual investors, analysts, and developers who need customizable tools for market analysis.

name: OpenMeter
tagline: Open-source usage metering and billing.
description: OpenMeter is an open-source usage metering and billing system for SaaS companies. It helps track customer usage and generate invoices based on consumption.

name: Paymenter
tagline: Open-source invoicing and billing platform.
description: Paymenter is an open-source alternative to proprietary billing software, designed for freelancers and small businesses. It offers invoicing, payment tracking, and client management in a self-hosted solution.

name: Polar
tagline: Open-source funding and monetization platform.
description: Polar is an open-source platform for developers to accept donations, sell digital products, and manage subscriptions. It provides a simple way to monetize open-source projects and build a community around them.

name: Spliit
tagline: Split expenses with friends, effortlessly.
description: Spliit is a free, open-source expense splitting app that helps groups track shared costs and settle debts. It offers a simple interface for adding expenses, calculating balances, and recording payments, making it ideal for roommates, travelers, and friends.

name: Suprascribe
tagline: Automated subscription billing and management.
description: Suprascribe is a subscription management platform that automates recurring billing, invoicing, and revenue recognition for SaaS businesses. It integrates with popular payment gateways and provides analytics to track subscription metrics.

name: UniBee
tagline: Open-source billing for SaaS businesses.
description: UniBee is an open-source billing platform designed for SaaS companies. It handles subscription management, invoicing, and payment processing, making it easy to manage recurring revenue.

name: Horilla
tagline: Open-source HRMS for modern teams.
description: Horilla is a free, open-source human resource management system designed for small to medium-sized businesses. It offers core HR functions like employee management, leave tracking, and attendance monitoring.

name: Reqcore
tagline: Streamline HR workflows with intelligent automation.
description: Reqcore automates repetitive HR tasks like onboarding, offboarding, and leave management. It helps HR teams reduce manual work and improve accuracy.

name: Dub Partners
tagline: Open-source partner marketing platform.
description: Dub Partners is an open-source platform for managing partner and affiliate programs. It helps businesses track referrals, manage payouts, and grow their partner network.

name: Postiz
tagline: Open-source social media scheduling tool
description: Postiz is an open-source social media management platform that allows users to schedule, publish, and analyze posts across multiple social networks. It serves marketers and content creators seeking a self-hosted alternative to proprietary tools.

name: Billion Mail
tagline: Send bulk emails with high deliverability.
description: Billion Mail is a bulk email sending service designed for marketers and businesses. It offers high deliverability rates and detailed analytics to track campaign performance.

name: Brace.to
tagline: Open-source customer engagement platform
description: Brace.to is an open-source alternative to tools like Intercom, designed for marketing and customer engagement. It helps businesses communicate with users via in-app messages, email, and push notifications.

name: Chaskiq
tagline: Open-source live chat and customer engagement platform.
description: Chaskiq is an open-source alternative to Intercom, providing live chat, chatbots, and email marketing tools. It helps businesses engage with website visitors, automate responses, and manage customer conversations.

name: Chatwoot
tagline: Open-source customer engagement platform.
description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer engagement platform that helps businesses manage conversations across email, chat, and social media. It serves as an alternative to tools like Intercom and Zendesk, offering a unified inbox for customer support.

name: Contentport
tagline: Open-source marketing automation for teams.
description: Contentport is an open-source marketing automation platform that helps teams manage campaigns, track customer interactions, and analyze performance. It serves marketers looking for a customizable, self-hosted alternative to proprietary tools.

name: Sendportal
tagline: Self-hosted email marketing, no per-subscriber fees.
description: Sendportal is a self-hosted email marketing platform that lets you manage newsletters and campaigns without recurring costs. It's designed for businesses and creators who want full control over their email data and budget.

name: Sendune
tagline: Email marketing made simple and effective
description: Sendune is an email marketing platform that helps businesses create, send, and track email campaigns with ease. It offers a user-friendly interface and powerful analytics to optimize engagement.

name: Shlink
tagline: Self-hosted URL shortener with analytics
description: Shlink is a self-hosted URL shortener that gives you full control over your links and tracking data. It provides detailed analytics, custom slugs, and REST API access, making it ideal for developers and privacy-conscious users.

name: Sink
tagline: Fast link shortener with analytics on Cloudflare
description: Sink is a simple, speedy, and secure URL shortener that runs entirely on Cloudflare. It offers built-in analytics and is a great open-source alternative to Bitly.

name: Slugy
tagline: Beautiful, trackable short links with team features
description: Slugy is an open-source URL shortener that transforms long URLs into elegant, trackable short links. It offers advanced analytics, link-in-bio pages, custom domains, and team collaboration, making it ideal for marketers and teams.

name: Tiledesk
tagline: Open-source AI chatbots with human handoff.
description: Tiledesk is an open-source, no-code platform for building AI chatbots and connecting live agents. It enables you to create sophisticated LLM-powered chatbots that seamlessly escalate to human support when needed, perfect for customer service and marketing teams.

name: TryPost
tagline: Self-hosted social media scheduler for creators.
description: TryPost is an open-source social media scheduling tool that lets you manage and schedule posts across multiple platforms like Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, and more. Designed for creators and marketers, it offers full control over your content calendar with self-hosting capabilities.
features: Schedule posts to multiple social networks
Supports Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube

name: Usertour
tagline: Open-source user onboarding with full control.
description: Usertour is an open-source platform for creating in-app product tours, checklists, and surveys. It offers a customizable alternative to proprietary tools like Userflow and Appcues, enabling teams to boost feature adoption and user retention.

name: useSend
tagline: Pay-per-send email API with SES dashboard
description: useSend is an open-source email delivery platform that lets you send transactional emails via Amazon SES without monthly fees. It provides a dashboard for monitoring sends, bounces, and complaints, making it a cost-effective alternative to SendGrid or Postmark.
features: Pay only for emails sent, not contacts

name: WR.DO
tagline: Smart URL shortener with deep analytics
description: WR.DO is a URL shortening service that offers detailed click analytics, custom domains, and QR code generation. It helps marketers and businesses track and optimize their link performance.

name: Wraps
tagline: Turn any content into shareable, branded wraps.
description: Wraps is a tool that lets you create visually appealing, branded summaries or 'wraps' from any content—articles, videos, or documents. It's designed for marketers and content creators to repurpose and share content in a fresh, engaging format.
features: Create branded wraps from any URL
Share wraps as images or links

name: Zammad
tagline: Open source helpdesk for modern customer support.
description: Zammad is a web-based, open source helpdesk and customer support system. It offers a streamlined ticketing system with multi-channel support, enabling teams to manage inquiries from email, chat, and social media in one place.

name: ClearFlask
tagline: User feedback integrated into your product roadmap.
description: ClearFlask helps product teams collect, prioritize, and act on user feedback directly within their development workflow. It bridges the gap between customer insights and product planning, enabling data-driven decisions.
features: Collect feedback via widgets and portals

name: Cossistant
tagline: Code-first AI support for React & Next.js apps
description: Cossistant is an open-source customer support platform that lets developers embed fully customizable AI agents into React and Next.js applications. It combines programmable actions, custom UI, and human handoff for a code-first support workflow.

name: Formbricks
tagline: Open-source experience management for product teams
description: Formbricks is an open-source survey and experience management platform that lets you build in-app surveys, forms, and feedback widgets. It's a privacy-first alternative to Qualtrics and Typeform, designed for product teams who want to own their data.

name: Frappe Helpdesk
tagline: Simple, open-source customer support for growing teams.
description: Frappe Helpdesk is a lightweight, open-source ticketing system designed for small to medium teams. It integrates seamlessly with Frappe Framework and offers a clean interface for managing customer queries.
features: Email integration for automatic ticket creation

name: Freescout
tagline: Self-hosted help desk & shared mailbox
description: FreeScout is a free, self-hosted help desk and shared mailbox that serves as a lightweight alternative to Zendesk or Help Scout. It is built with Laravel and PHP, offering a clean interface for managing customer support tickets and emails.

name: LogChimp
tagline: Customer feedback hub for product teams
description: LogChimp helps product teams collect, organize, and act on user feedback. It's an open-source alternative to Canny and ProductBoard, enabling you to build a public roadmap and prioritize features based on customer input.
features: Collect feedback via widgets and boards
Public roadmap to share with users
Integrate with Slack, GitHub, and more

name: Reflet
tagline: Build reactive web apps with graph data models
description: Reflet provides tools for building Re-frame + React based web applications that leverage graph and non-graph data models. It integrates finite state machines and ClojureScript to manage complex state and UI interactions.

name: Hermes Agent
tagline: Open-source AI agent that evolves with your needs
description: Hermes Agent is an open-source AI assistant that runs natively on macOS, Windows, and Linux. It adapts to your workflow, offering personalized support across tasks like coding, research, and automation.

name: Langflow
tagline: Visual builder for AI agents and workflows
description: Langflow provides a drag-and-drop interface to design, test, and deploy AI-powered agents and multi-agent workflows. It integrates with large language models and supports generative AI applications, making it accessible for developers and non-technical users alike.
features: Deploy as API or embed in apps

name: Latitude
tagline: Open-source observability for AI agents
description: Latitude provides full monitoring and tracing for AI agents and LLM applications. It helps developers debug errors, track performance, and gain insights into agent behavior in production.

name: LibreChat
tagline: Unify all AI chats in one open-source hub
description: LibreChat is an enhanced ChatGPT clone that aggregates multiple AI providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Azure into a single interface. It supports advanced features such as agents, code interpretation, and secure multi-user auth, making it ideal for teams and power users who want a customizable, self-hosted AI chat platform.

name: LLM Gateway
tagline: Unified gateway to 14+ free LLM providers
description: LLM Gateway aggregates multiple free LLM providers behind a single OpenAI-compatible API. It offers automatic fallback routing, rate limit tracking, and a web dashboard for monitoring, making it easy to access diverse language models without managing separate integrations.

name: LobeChat
tagline: Open-source chat platform with built-in database
description: LobeChat is an open-source chat application that integrates a database for persistent storage. It supports multiple AI providers and offers a customizable interface for personal or team use.

name: Milvus
tagline: Cloud-native vector database for AI similarity search
description: Milvus is a high-performance vector database designed for scalable ANN search. It supports distributed deployment, multiple index types, and hybrid search, making it ideal for AI applications like RAG, image search, and LLM memory.
features: Hybrid search combining vector and scalar

name: Multica
tagline: Turn coding agents into collaborative teammates
description: Multica is an open-source platform for managing AI coding agents as team members. Assign tasks, track progress, and let agents compound skills over time, enabling seamless collaboration between humans and AI.

name: Nango
tagline: Unified API integrations for AI agents and products.
description: Nango provides a platform to build, run, and maintain integrations with over 800 APIs. It handles OAuth flows, token management, and offers a unified API, enabling developers to connect their products and AI agents efficiently at scale.

name: OpenLLMetry
tagline: OpenTelemetry-based observability for LLM apps
description: OpenLLMetry provides open-source observability for GenAI and LLM applications using OpenTelemetry. It enables monitoring, tracing, and metrics collection for AI models, helping developers debug and optimize performance.
features: Track token usage and cost metrics
Debug prompts and responses with traces
Integrates with Python and popular frameworks

name: Portkey AI Gateway
tagline: Unified API gateway for 1,600+ LLMs with guardrails
description: Portkey AI Gateway provides a single, fast API to route requests to over 1,600 large language models. It includes built-in guardrails for safety, observability, and cost control, making it ideal for developers building production AI applications.
features: Route to 1,600+ LLMs via one API
Integrated guardrails for safety and compliance
Blazing fast performance with low latency
Supports LangChain, MCP, and OpenAI protocols

name: Qdrant
tagline: Rust-powered vector search for AI at scale
description: Qdrant is a high-performance vector database and search engine built in Rust, designed for massive-scale similarity search. It supports hybrid search, image and text embeddings, and offers a cloud service for easy deployment.
features: Blazing-fast HNSW-based approximate nearest neighbor search
Hybrid search combining vector and keyword queries
RESTful and gRPC APIs for easy integration
Cloud-native with horizontal scaling and replication

name: Rivet
tagline: Stateful actors for AI agents and real-time apps
description: Rivet provides a primitive for building stateful, long-running workloads like AI agents and collaborative applications. It offers durable execution, real-time multiplayer capabilities, and can run on Rivet Cloud or within your own VPC.
features: Stateful actor model for AI agents
Deploy on Rivet Cloud or self-hosted VPC
Built with Rust for high performance

name: Browser Use
tagline: Let AI agents browse and act on any website.
description: Browser Use is an open-source tool that enables AI agents to interact with websites just like a human would. It leverages Playwright for browser automation and LLMs for intelligent task execution, making it ideal for automating complex online workflows.

name: Cherry Studio
tagline: Your all-in-one AI desktop hub for productivity
description: Cherry Studio is a free, open-source desktop client that unifies access to major LLMs, AI agents, image generation, and a knowledge base. It stores data locally and runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux, catering to power users who need a versatile AI workspace.

name: Fullmoon
tagline: Private AI chats on your device
description: Fullmoon lets you run large language models locally on your device, ensuring complete privacy. It supports various models and provides a simple interface for chatting without sending data to the cloud.

name: Inbox Zero
tagline: AI-powered email assistant to reach inbox zero.
description: Inbox Zero is an open-source AI personal assistant that helps you manage your email efficiently. It automates replies, unsubscribes from unwanted newsletters, blocks cold emails, and provides analytics to track your inbox habits.

name: Jan
tagline: Private AI chat that runs entirely offline
description: Jan is a desktop application that lets you run large language models locally on your computer without an internet connection. It supports various open-source models and provides a ChatGPT-like interface for private, self-hosted AI interactions.

name: Manage
tagline: Streamline projects with a simple, visual workflow.
description: Manage is a lightweight project management tool that helps teams organize tasks, track progress, and collaborate efficiently. It offers a clean interface with kanban boards, timelines, and custom workflows suitable for small to medium-sized teams.

name: OpenProject
tagline: Open-source project management for all methodologies
description: OpenProject is a comprehensive project management tool supporting classic, agile, and hybrid approaches. It offers Gantt charts, Kanban boards, issue tracking, and time/cost reporting for teams of all sizes.

name: Operately
tagline: Open-source project management for growing teams
description: Operately is an open-source project management tool designed for growing teams. It offers features like goal tracking, project timelines, and team collaboration in a self-hosted environment.

name: Orgnise
tagline: Your all-in-one workspace for notes, tasks, and projects.
description: Orgnise is a unified workspace that combines note-taking, task management, and project planning into a single, intuitive interface. It helps individuals and teams stay organized by centralizing information and workflows, with features like kanban boards, calendars, and markdown support.

name: Plane
tagline: Open-source project management for modern teams
description: Plane is a versatile project management platform that combines task tracking, sprint planning, documentation, and issue triage. It serves as an open-source alternative to Jira, Linear, and Monday, with support for cloud, self-hosted, and air-gapped deployments.

name: Planka
tagline: Self-hosted Kanban for agile teams
description: Planka is a self-hosted Kanban board that enables real-time collaboration for agile project management. It offers unlimited users, GDPR compliance, and a free Community Edition, making it ideal for teams seeking control over their data.

name: Sayr
tagline: Unite internal tasks with public feedback
description: Sayr combines project management and user feedback into a single, transparent platform. Teams can manage tasks with Kanban boards while collecting and prioritizing public input, making collaboration open and efficient.

name: Shelve
tagline: Secure secrets management for dev teams
description: Shelve is an open-source tool for managing secrets and environment variables. It offers a CLI, GitHub sync, and collaboration features, making it easy for teams to securely store and share sensitive data.

name: ShipShipShip
tagline: Self-hosted changelog and roadmap with community voting.
description: ShipShipShip is a lightweight, self-hostable web app for sharing product updates and managing roadmaps. It allows you to publish changelogs, collect feedback through voting on upcoming features, and engage your community. Built with SvelteKit and Go, it supports Docker deployment and includes a REST API.

name: Super Productivity
tagline: Timebox your tasks and track time locally
description: Super Productivity is a privacy-first task manager with integrated time tracking and timeboxing. It supports Pomodoro and Flowtime techniques, and syncs with Jira, GitLab, GitHub, and Open Project for issue management.

name: Taiga
tagline: Track and discover anime on Windows
description: Taiga is a lightweight desktop app for Windows that helps you manage your anime library, track watched episodes, and discover new series. It integrates with AniList, Kitsu, and MyAnimeList to sync your progress.

name: Vikunja
tagline: Self-hosted task management with Kanban and Gantt.
description: Vikunja is an open-source task manager that puts you in control. It offers lists, Kanban boards, and Gantt charts for project management, and can be self-hosted or used via their EU-hosted service.

name: Wekan
tagline: Open-source kanban board with real-time collaboration
description: Wekan is a free and open-source kanban board application built with Meteor. It offers real-time updates, drag-and-drop task management, and supports Docker deployment. Ideal for teams seeking a self-hosted alternative to Trello.

name: Windshift
tagline: Angular 6 project management made simple
description: Windshift is a lightweight project management tool built with Angular 6. It helps small teams organize tasks and track progress with a clean, responsive interface.

name: Worklenz
tagline: Streamline team projects with integrated task and time tracking
description: Worklenz is a comprehensive project management tool that combines task management, time tracking, and resource planning in one platform. Designed for efficient teams, it offers a REST API and scheduler for seamless workflow automation.

name: Affine
tagline: Docs, whiteboards, and databases in one local-first workspace.
description: AFFiNE is an open-source knowledge base that combines documents, whiteboards, and databases into a single local-first workspace. It prioritizes privacy and offers customizable tools for planning, sorting, and creating content. Ideal for teams seeking a Notion and Miro alternative.

name: Campfire
tagline: Open-source team chat with built-in project management
description: Campfire is an open-source collaboration platform that combines real-time messaging with project management tools. It offers channels, direct messages, task tracking, and file sharing, making it suitable for teams seeking a self-hosted alternative to Slack or Discord.
features: Real-time messaging with channels and DMs
Self-hosted for data privacy and control

name: Cinny
tagline: Simple, secure Matrix client with end-to-end encryption
description: Cinny is a modern Matrix client that offers a clean and intuitive interface for instant messaging. It supports end-to-end encryption for private conversations and is built with React, providing a responsive experience across devices.
features: Built with React for fast performance

name: CryptPad
tagline: Private, encrypted collaboration for documents and files.
description: CryptPad is an end-to-end encrypted office suite that enables real-time collaborative editing of documents, spreadsheets, presentations, and more. It ensures data privacy by encrypting all content before it leaves your device, making it ideal for teams and individuals who prioritize security.

name: ACI.dev
tagline: Open-source AI development platform for teams.
description: ACI.dev is an open-source platform that streamlines AI development with collaborative tools and version control. It serves developers and teams building AI applications, offering a unified environment for managing datasets, models, and experiments.

name: Agenta
tagline: Open-source platform for LLM app development.
description: Agenta is an open-source platform that simplifies building, evaluating, and deploying LLM applications. It provides tools for prompt management, versioning, and A/B testing, enabling teams to iterate faster and deliver reliable AI solutions.

name: Dify
tagline: Open-source platform for building AI apps.
description: Dify is an open-source platform that simplifies the creation of AI applications using large language models. It offers a visual workflow builder, RAG engine, and agent capabilities, enabling developers to build, deploy, and manage AI apps efficiently.

name: FastGPT
tagline: Open-source AI platform for building custom GPTs.
description: FastGPT is an open-source platform that enables developers to create, deploy, and manage custom GPT models. It provides a visual workflow builder and integrates with various data sources, making AI development accessible for teams.

name: mlop
tagline: Open-source ML infrastructure for teams.
description: Mlop is an open-source platform that simplifies machine learning infrastructure management. It helps teams deploy, monitor, and scale ML models efficiently.

name: Ever Gauzy
tagline: Open-source CRM for sales and project management.
description: Ever Gauzy is an open-source platform that combines CRM, sales pipeline management, and project tracking. It serves small to medium businesses looking for a customizable, self-hosted solution to manage customer relationships and team workflows.

name: Novu
tagline: Open-source notification infrastructure for developers.
description: Novu is an open-source platform that provides a unified API for managing multi-channel notifications (email, SMS, push, in-app). It helps engineering teams build and scale notification systems without vendor lock-in.

name: Fider
tagline: Collect and prioritize user feedback openly.
description: Fider is an open-source platform that helps you collect, organize, and prioritize customer feedback and feature requests. It provides a transparent way for users to submit ideas and vote on them, enabling data-driven product decisions.
features: Submit and vote on feature ideas

name: Pipeshub
tagline: Extensible AI workplace for enterprise search and automation
description: PipesHub is an open-source platform that combines enterprise search with workflow automation, powered by AI agents and knowledge graphs. It integrates with tools like Gmail, Slack, and Notion to provide explainable, context-aware assistance for teams.

name: Baserow
tagline: Open-source no-code database and app builder
description: Baserow is an open-source platform that lets you create databases, applications, and automations without coding. It offers a user-friendly spreadsheet-like interface with powerful database features, REST API, and self-hosting options. Ideal for teams needing a flexible, compliant alternative to Airtable.
features: Build custom apps with no code
